documentation.text:
@title OAppSender
 @dev Abstract contract implementing the OAppSender functionality for sending messages to a LayerZero endpoint.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (struct MessagingParams memory,address) view external returns (struct MessagingFee memory)
function (struct MessagingParams memory,address) payable external returns (struct MessagingReceipt memory)
function (struct MessagingParams memory,address) payable external returns (struct MessagingReceipt memory)
